title: Featured Projects
subtitle: A selection of work showcasing technical depth and attention to detail

projects.title: React Design System Library
projects.description: A comprehensive design system featuring 20+ production-ready components with TypeScript support, theme customization, and accessibility built-in. Includes documentation, interactive examples, and a flexible Tailwind-based styling approach for rapid development.

projects.title: Food Recipe App
projects.description: A food recipe app that allows you to search for recipes and view detailed information about them.

projects.title: Minecraft Clone
projects.description: A Minecraft clone built with React and Vite. It allows you to build and explore a 3D world.
